MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-07-2022 Dismissal

Notice Of Motion To Compel Responses, Or In The Alternative Have Requests For Admission Deem Admitted
Off Calendar Dec-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion To Compel Responses, Or In The Alternative Have Requests For Admission Deem Admitted.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed. Plaintiff to provide responses to Requests for Admissions on or before January 10, 2022 or the requests will be deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

order is signed.
